subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Sovereign! This is a Day wherein the vibration of Thy Most Glorious Name hath seized all who dwell in earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سلطانی هذا یوم فیه اخذ اهتزاز اسمک الابهی من فی الارض و السماء و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @nearness and remoteness
